name: Sara Ponessa
background: Ms. Ponessa has served as our Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since 2018. Prior to joining Livent, she was Senior Counsel at FMC from 2014 to 2018. Previously, she served as Vice President and Assistant General Counsel at AstraZeneca.

company_affiliations.name: FMC Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary
